label: P&L Waterfall
description: Structural P&L breakdown with factor bars, drill-down by strategy, residual, and net total.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: No direct lib/mocks imports (mock imports are in data-context only).

0.8.note: Error handled at PnLDataProvider level — provider short-circuits rendering and shows error UI before mounting widget; WidgetErrorBoundary catches runtime throws.

0.9.note: No commented-out or dead code. No fixes required.

l0.notes: 0.1 ✓ WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 ✓ requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 ✓ availableOn: [pnl]. 0.4 ✓ No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 ✓ No direct lib/mocks imports (mock imports are in data-context only). 0.6 ✓ isLoading skeleton already present (lines 149-165). 0.7 ✓ pnlComponents.length === 0 empty guard present. 0.8 ✓ Error handled at PnLDataProvider level — provider short-circuits rendering and shows error UI before mounting widget; WidgetErrorBoundary catches runtime throws. 0.9 ✓ No commented-out or dead code. No fixes required.

1.1.note: All data via usePnLData() hook — no inline fetch or direct import.

1.2.note: pnl-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 116) and filters strategies/orgs/clients via scope.

1.3.note: selectedOrgIds synced from globalScope.organizationIds in useEffect (line 180); filterMultiplier reacts to org selection.

1.4.note: selectedClientIds derived from globalScope.clientIds or getClientIdsForOrgs(); cascades in filterMultiplier.

1.5.note: selectedStrategyIds via getStrategyIdsForScope(globalScope); filtered in apiStrategies memo.

1.6.note: Empty scope arrays leave filterMultiplier at 1 (no scaling) — unfiltered dataset returned.

1.7.note: SHARE_CLASSES/SHARE_CLASS_LABELS from lib/types/defi; formatPercent from lib/utils/formatters — no reference data in lib/mocks.

l1.notes: 1.1 ✓ All data via usePnLData() hook — no inline fetch or direct import. 1.2 ✓ pnl-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 116) and filters strategies/orgs/clients via scope. 1.3 ✓ selectedOrgIds synced from globalScope.organizationIds in useEffect (line 180); filterMultiplier reacts to org selection. 1.4 ✓ selectedClientIds derived from globalScope.clientIds or getClientIdsForOrgs(); cascades in filterMultiplier. 1.5 ✓ selectedStrategyIds via getStrategyIdsForScope(globalScope); filtered in apiStrategies memo. 1.6 ✓ Empty scope arrays leave filterMultiplier at 1 (no scaling) — unfiltered dataset returned. 1.7 ✓ SHARE_CLASSES/SHARE_CLASS_LABELS from lib/types/defi; formatPercent from lib/utils/formatters — no reference data in lib/mocks.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

findings: L0 — All 9 checks passed. No fixes required. isLoading skeleton, empty guard, and error handling via provider were already in place.
L1 — All 7 checks passed. Context reads useGlobalScope(), filters org/client/strategy, empty scope = all data.
